raw.title: History suggests inequality ends in catastrophe. We need another path
raw.excerpt: History offers a grim account of how structural change occurs. But concealed within that bleakness is a window of possibility that opens just when things fall apart.

llm_processed.summary: This article argues that rising inequality ends in catastrophe and that we need a different path.
llm_processed.lateral_potential: This topic often leads to discussions on experimenting new forms of hierarchy, circular economy, education and perspectival view.
